markets.rules_primary: If Los Angeles A wins by more than 2.5 runs in the first 5 innings of the Los Angeles A vs Cleveland professional baseball game originally scheduled for May 12, 2026 at 6:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days).
